purpose: Saudi mother in her forties and adult daughter in her twenties together. Generational warmth. Modest hijab on both.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Authentic warm candid photograph of a Saudi mother in her late forties and her adult daughter in her mid-twenties together in soft warm interior setting, both wearing modest hijab in coordinated earth-tone abayas, mother's hijab in beige or soft taupe daughter in slightly more contemporary cream or warm beige, both with real visible skin texture and natural complexion showing age difference authentically, candid moment of conversation or shared smile, daughter perhaps holding {brand_product} or both leaning in to look at it together, natural golden-hour window light, warm interior with traditional or contemporary Saudi home elements slightly out of focus, shot from across-the-room angle suggesting natural family moment captured by phone, authentic generational warmth non-staged composition {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: model perfect features both subjects
Avoid in output: AI face failures
Never present non-Saudi talent or generic Middle-Eastern look — Saudi specificity is the point
Avoid tourist-photography aesthetic; this is lived-in lifestyle, not destination shoot
notes: Intents: grow, defend. Source code in research corpus: S09. Saudi adaptation guidance: Multi-generational family scenes deeply resonant in Saudi market — signal cultural continuity and family values. Critical: AI tends to make mother characters look like older sisters. Prompt explicitly demands 'showing age difference authentically.' Reference image: Not required. Recommended frequency: Weekly for family-oriented brands, daily during gifting occasions. Compliance level: elevated.
